# Craft

Use this for end-to-end frontend implementation with a high quality bar.

## Workflow
1. Shape the design first.
2. Read existing design-system and adjacent UI patterns.
3. Build semantic structure and correct flow.
4. Add state coverage.
5. Refine spacing, hierarchy, color, and motion.
6. Inspect responsive behavior and patch defects.
7. Do at least one critique-and-fix pass.

## Non-negotiables
- Real hierarchy before decoration
- Accessible controls and focus states
- Intentional empty, loading, and error states
- No placeholders left behind unless explicitly accepted
- Reuse shared components where appropriate

## Definition of done
- looks intentional at key viewports
- handles expected states
- matches local design-system conventions
- no obvious AI-template styling
